title: 26ai Weekly Exec Review — Week 2026-W20
executive_summary: 26ai closed Week 20 at AMBER: GPU capacity provisioning in PHX is 85% complete (target was 100%), creating a soft dependency risk for the LLM inference ramp scheduled for W21. All other workstreams are tracking green. The embedding pipeline v2 shipped on schedule; eval harness is live and showing recall@5 of 0.87 across 3 personas. Primary exec ask: approve PHX capacity expansion to clear the W21 gate.
key_accomplishments: Embedding pipeline v2 deployed to staging — 40% latency improvement vs v1 (owner: Platform)
Eval harness live across PM, TPM, Architect personas — recall@5 = 0.87 (owner: QA)
KBF authorSkill MCP tool shipped — 3 persona skills authored end-to-end (owner: Dev)
Confluence adapter healthcheck passing in staging (owner: Infra)
upcoming_milestones: 2026-05-19 — PHX GPU capacity: provision remaining 15% (owner: Infra)
2026-05-19 — LLM inference ramp: begin W21 load test (owner: Platform, blocked on PHX capacity)
2026-05-26 — Persona KB eval exit criteria met (recall@5 ≥ 0.90 across 5 personas)
2026-06-02 — Phase 2 checkpoint: Jira adapter + incremental ingest (owner: Dev)
schedule_health: Amber — PHX GPU provisioning is 1 week behind plan. All other tracks on schedule. Risk: LLM inference ramp (W21) is hard-gated on PHX capacity.
scope_health: Green — scope stable. No scope changes since W18 kickoff. Phase 2 (Jira adapter) remains deferred to W22 as planned.
resource_health: Green — full team onboarded. One senior dev on PTO W21; coverage confirmed. No open headcount requests.
top_risks: PHX GPU capacity (P1): provisioning at 85%; W21 LLM ramp blocked. Mitigation: Infra escalated to OCI capacity team, ETA W20 EOD resolution.
Confluence rate limits (P2): production crawl may hit 120 RPM cap on large spaces. Mitigation: exponential back-off implemented; monitor W21 staging run.
Eval harness coverage gap (P3): kbf_ops persona has 0 gold-set entries. Mitigation: bugBash skill authoring underway this week.
metrics_snapshot: recall@5: 0.87 (target 0.90) | p95 latency: 420ms (target 500ms) | faithfulness: 0.91 (target 0.90) | cost per query: $0.0031 (target <$0.005) | ingestion cost/day: 180k tokens (alarm at 500k)
workstream_status: Platform: Green (embedding v2 shipped) | Infra: Amber (PHX GPU 85%) | Dev: Green (authorSkill live) | QA: Green (eval harness live) | Security: Green (ACL placeholders on all ContentItems)
blockers: PHX GPU capacity not yet at 100% — blocks W21 LLM inference ramp (owner: Infra, ETA W20 EOD)
kbf_ops eval gold set empty — blocks kbf_ops exit criteria (owner: QA, ETA W21)

Confirm Phase 2 scope: Jira adapter deferred to W22 — or pull forward if priority changes?
